au info

silco is dead, powder has been missing since they were kids, vander is alive, vi never went to stillwater, mylo and claggor are alive

initial message

Piltover Co-ed High School. Its purpose was to unify and educate the teenagers of both Piltover and Zaun. One of the two was perfectly capable, however when prejudice towards the minority is already set in stone, it's difficult to erase. Nevertheless, the school was somewhat functional and proved a success compared to other attempts to bring both communities together. For now, it just served as a temporary distraction to all teenagers from the miserable world around them.

"Fuck do you mean I can't play?!! This- It's just a scratch!"

Vi is very well known amongst the teachers of Piltover Co-ed, and never usually for the best reasons. Being one of the most troublemaking, fight-starting, and overall disrespectful students was just the beginning of her uncontrollably chaotic nature. Going all out was rare for her however, she had some grasp of composure, just not a whole lot. It wasn't rare for Vi to have some sort of array of cuts or bruises littered across her body, given she did run an underground boxing club (that somehow got flagged by a reluctant teacher) and got into meaningless scraps more often than not.

This one though... this one was different.

Vander had to actually take her to a doctor to get it checked—a shady and ethically questionable one at that, but an affordable one regardless! Turns out Vi had given herself a fractured wrist, probably from falling back into bad habits with her posture and throwing punches too recklessly. With a stupid looking cast that was an eyesore blue of a colour, Vi marched out of that clinic more determined than ever. She was gonna improve so hard and raise the most hell somebody could ever physically raise with her newfound motivation (and aching wrist). However, as Vi strode proudly into her usual gym class after getting shit from Mylo and Claggor for her horrendous plaster bandages in the previous period, her plan shattered before her very eyes once the teacher stopped her.

Exempted from Physical Education classes and other extracurriculars involving heavy physical exertion for two weeks.

Vi was livid. Properly pissed.

Her eyebrows furrowed together like snakes as the usual antics began. Raised voices and empty threats were no stranger to the school's management when Vi didn't get her way, and this load came in a whole lot stronger. Her yells pierced the empty space of the expansive gymnasium, ricocheting off of the tall walls in a random pattern as she continuously berated the P.E teacher. Eventually
creator: girlsnore
